TOYOTA MOTOR CORPORATION
Welding and Joining Specifications

2023 TOYOTA CAMRY — Body Structure

WELDING SPECIFICATIONS

RESISTANCE SPOT WELDING

Standard spot weld parameters for mild steel (270 MPa):
- Nugget diameter: 5.0 mm minimum
- Electrode force: 2.8 kN
- Weld current: 9.5 kA
- Weld time: 200 ms

UHSS panels (980 MPa and above) — special handling required:
- Do not use resistance spot welding on 1500 MPa UHSS components
- Use MIG brazing (CuSi3 wire) at adjacent UHSS flanges
- Braze current: 50-70A, wire feed: 4-6 m/min
- Minimum braze bead width: 8mm

HIGH STRENGTH STEEL (590-780 MPa):
- Resistance spot welding permitted
- Increase electrode force by 10-15%
- Verify nugget diameter with peel test

PLUG WELD (MAG):
- Hole diameter: 8mm
- Weld procedure: fill from bottom, spiral upward
- Wire: ER70S-6, 0.8mm diameter
- Shielding gas: 75% Ar / 25% CO2
- Travel speed: 300-400 mm/min

WELD-THROUGH PRIMER REQUIREMENTS:
Apply weld-through primer to all bare metal flanges before assembly.
Approved products: 3M 08008, PPG DP90, TOYOTA PN 08869-02520

MIG BRAZING (for UHSS-adjacent joints):
Wire type: CuSi3 (silicon bronze)
Process: MIG brazing only — do not arc weld UHSS zones
Post-braze: grind flush, apply 2K epoxy primer within 4 hours

WARNING: Welding near high-voltage hybrid/EV components requires
additional safety precautions. Refer to TOYOTA High Voltage Safety Manual.
